creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that putty 0.77 also uses share/cmake/Modules/GNUInstallDirs.cmake by way of include(GNUInstallDirs) - so everything is in working order if you build with an up-to-date cmake.  Your older cmake does not appear to be 

https://gitlab.kitware.com/cmake/cmake/-/commit/c07bba27302960fc2f35b6a9e00eab8b32ca9a49

which got merged through commit dbf0c8c233 as v3.23.0-rc1~288.
